purpose: Record the Unreal preview-map and capture automation run after the first-party procedural material recipe manifest and production geospatial attachment ledger became required inputs, after the softened source-drape plus boulder-contact foam preview renderer pass, guide-seat foliage setback and scale tuning, source-aware bank breakup texture patches, biome-specific deadfall/grass/root ecology props, flow-aware waterline pebble scatter, first-party irregular rock geometry variants, flow-band depth texture ribbons, and river-specific cloud/haze/horizon backdrop cards.
unreal_log_summary: Using first-party procedural material recipe plan: unreal/Content/RaftSim/Rendering/first_party_procedural_material_recipes.json

Saved all three generated preview maps with softened source-drape overlays, boulder-contact foam laces, guide-seat foliage setback and scale tuning, source-aware bank breakup texture patches, biome-specific deadfall/grass/root ecology props, flow-aware waterline pebble scatter, first-party irregular rock geometry variants, flow-band depth texture ribbons, and river-specific cloud/haze/horizon backdrop cards.
Saved guide-seat and river-eye captures for South Fork American, Colorado River Grand Canyon, and Pacuare River Rainforest.
Environment preview capture manifest saved successfully.
current_decision: This run validates the rebuilt editor module and refreshed preview assets after the material recipe gate, the source attachment ledger gate, the first contact-foam/overlay-softening renderer pass, guide-seat foliage readability tuning, source-aware bank breakup texture patches, biome-specific deadfall/grass/root ecology props, bounded flow-aware shoreline scatter, first-party irregular rock geometry variants, flow-band depth texture ribbons, and river-specific cloud/haze/horizon backdrop cards. The images remain preview-only and cannot be called lifelike until production terrain/material/water/foliage assets, guide review, rights review, and performance evidence pass.
